_comment: Map a scene slot id to a YouTube-Unlisted video id or URL, e.g. "dark-highway": "dQw4w9WgXcQ" or a full watch/share/embed URL. Slot ids are the drop-in filename stems (see public/road-ahead/video/README.md). A dropped-in .mp4 file always wins over YouTube for quality. Keys starting with _ are ignored. Edit this data file (no code change) and redeploy — the scene picks it up automatically.
_pending_unassigned_comment: Owner-supplied clips awaiting a scene assignment. These are NOT wired to any scene (the generator ignores _-prefixed keys). To assign one, move its id into the matching slot above. Do not guess — assign only on owner confirmation.
